title: StaffModeration
description: StaffModeration plugin is the number 1 Minecraft server plugin needed
body:
**StaffModeration – Advanced Server Management Suite**

StaffModeration is a high-performance Minecraft plugin engineered to give server owners and staff absolute control over their community with speed and precision.

Instead of jumping between multiple plugins, StaffModeration provides an all-in-one, professional toolkit designed with a clean, logic-first approach to ensure your server remains safe and lag-free.

**✨ Features:**

Integrated Staff Dashboard – A centralized GUI to manage all moderation tasks with a single click.
Precision Punishment System – Robust logic for bans, mutes, and kicks with instant database synchronization.
Advanced Spectator Engine – Monitor players in real-time with built-in health tracking and coordinate monitoring using the latest Attribute API.

Command Firewall – Intelligently blocks unauthorized commands during moderation to prevent bypasses.
Performance Optimized – Clean, documentation-free Java code designed for maximum execution speed and low RAM usage
.

**Dependency**

- KervsCore

**🛡️ Commands:**

- `sm` – Launch the central Staff Command Center and GUI.
- `smreload` – Instant configuration hot-reload without a server restart.
- `tiertest` - Open Tiertest list
- `tier set` - Set tier of the player like LT5,LT4
- `ban` - ban a player
- `tempban` - temporarily ban a player
- `banip` - ban the players ip to preventing creating second account on the server
- `mute` - mute the player
- `tempmute` - temporarily mute players
- `freezechat` - Freeze the public chat
- `freeze` - freeze a player to prevent moving 
- `ss` - saying to the player to screenshare thier mods
- `invsee` - Checking the inventory of the players, with offhand check, armor slot check and you can remove and add items
- `inspect` - inspect a suspicious players

**Discord Integration**

- `!ip` - Show the ip of the server and other description 
- `!online` - Show online players on the server
- `/maintenance` - Maintenance Announcement 
- `/maintenancestop` - Stop the maintenance 
- `/announce` - Announce to the server and discord server
- `/link` - Link an account to discord so rank in game will automatically put into discord
- `/dailyrewards` - Daily rewards for the player

**💡 Why use StaffModeration?**

Efficiency is the key to a successful community. StaffModeration eliminates the bloat of traditional plugins, offering a "logic-first" solution that is both powerful and easy to use. It’s built to ensure that your staff can act fast, keeping the gameplay fair and the community protected.

**📌 Perfect for:**

- Competitive 
- Network Servers
- High-Traffic SMPs
- Hardcore Roleplay 
- Communities

**Professional Event Servers
Take full control of your server with the speed and elegance of StaffModeration!**

**❖ DEVELOPED BY KERVSDEV ❖**
